reasoning: On May 2, 2025, President Trump signed an executive order directly targeting NPR and PBS, instructing the CPB Board to cease direct funding to NPR and PBS and to forbid public broadcasters from using federal money for PBS or NPR programs. The Project 2025 Tracker spreadsheet monitors the completion of Trump's alignment with Project 2025 goals. Since Trump has taken definitive, highly public executive action that explicitly claims to fulfill the goal of ending taxpayer subsidies/funding to NPR and PBS, it is highly likely that the independent creators of the tracker will mark (or have already marked) this particular objective as "complete," even if legal battles ensue. There is ample time between the May 2 EO and the July 1, 2025 resolution date for the tracker to be updated to reflect this major administrative action.
